Privacy/Data Protection Authorities

Privacy / Data Protection Authorities
of which Boeing is Aware
 

LOCATION

AUTHORITY

Argentina

Dirección Nacional de Protección de Datos Personales

Australia

Office of the Australian Information Commissioner

Brazil

Autoridade Nacional de Proteção de Dados

Canada

Office of the Information and Privacy Commissioner of British Columbia

Canada

Office of the Information and Privacy Commissioner of Alberta

Canada

Commission d’accès à l’information du Québec

Canada

Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada

European Union Countries

EU Data Protection Authorities (by Country)

Hong Kong

Office of the Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data

Iceland

Icelandic Data Protection Authority

Israel

Privacy Protection Authority

Japan

Personal Information Protection Commission

Lichtenstein

Data Protection Commission

Malaysia

Office of the Personal Data Protection Commissioner

Mexico

Instituto Nacional de Transparencia, Acceso a la Información y Protección de Datos Personales

New Zealand

Office of the Privacy Commissioner

Norway

Norwegian Data Protection Authority

Russian Federation

Federal Service for Supervision of Communications, Information Technology and Mass Media

Singapore

Personal Data Protection Commission

South Africa

The Information Regulator

South Korea

Ministry of the Interior & Safety

Switzerland

Federl Data Protection and Information Commissioner

Taiwan

Ministry of Justice

The Philippines

National Privacy Commission

Ukraine

Ukranian Parliament Commission for Human Rights

United Kingdom

Information Commissioner's Office

United States

Federal Trade Commission

United States

State Attorneys General (by State)

Uruguay

Regulatory and Control Unit for the Protection of Personal Data

Uruguay

Ministry of Economy and Finance

Please contact the Boeing Global Privacy Office to advise us of any additions or corrections to this list.
